WANDERER-WANDERER.banter.alive.endTurnPi:
The cards do not bloom
Held in your frozen fingers
Spring becomes winter.
WANDERER-WANDERER.cardsModifierDescripti: __ cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
WANDERER-WANDERER.description:
A wandering warrior poet.
He carries a heavy curse and a heavier gourd.
WANDERER-WANDERER.goldMonologue: Line spoken when obtaining a large amount of gold
WANDERER-WANDERER.title: The Wanderer
WANDERER-WANDERER-POEM.1:
Dead my old fine hopes
and dry my dreaming but still
iris, blue each spring
WANDERER-WANDERER-POEM.2:
Deepen, drop, and die
many-hued chrysanthemums
one black earth for all
WANDERER-WANDERER-POEM.3:
So enviable
maple leaves most glorious
contemplating death
WANDERER-WANDERER-POEM.4:
Too curious flower
watching us pass, met death
our hungry donkey
WANDERER-WANDERER-POEM.5:
I dreamed of battles
and was slain, oh savage samurai
insatiable fleas!
WANDERER-WANDERER-GRACIOUS.3: Let's meet again in the next life.
